svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="xn2JyCFZLTcx0XpLYW9G"> <mxGraphModel dx="1226" dy="736" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="1" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="<div style="text-align: start; font-family: &quot;Segoe UI&quot;; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"><div style="line-height: 20px;"><div style="text-wrap-mode: wrap; line-height: 20px;">\begin{aligned} \theta &amp;: \mathrm{Ángulo\ de\ incidencia} &amp; \\ \alpha &amp;: \mathrm{Elevacion\ solar} \\ \gamma_p &amp;: \mathrm{Azimut\ del\ panel\ (90^\circ\ manana,\ 270^\circ\ tarde)} \\ \gamma_s &amp;: \mathrm{Azimut\ solar} \\ \theta_z &amp;: \mathrm{Angulo\ de\ cenit} \end{aligned}</div></div></div>" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="670" y="80" width="410" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 408px; height: 1px; padding-top: 75px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
text-align: start; font-family: "Segoe UI"; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;

g.data-latex: \begin{aligned} \theta &: \mathrm{Ángulo\ de\ incidencia} & \\ \alpha &: \mathrm{Elevacion\ solar} \\ \gamma_p &: \mathrm{Azimut\ del\ panel\ (90^\circ\ manana,\ 270^\circ\ tarde)} \\ \gamma_s &: \mathrm{Azimut\ solar} \\ \theta_z &: \mathrm{Angulo\ de\ cenit} \end{aligned}
